posts.author: Alan17 (Alan Evans)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All

Maybe this is a me thing and i’m not doing this right.

I have a monday.com board, for a project i am running. When i view the Gantt chart it looks good but there is no way to expand to include the subtasks.

Also when i try and export the plan to PDF it cuts it to 1 page. When i try to export to excel it just exports the top level activities.

When i export the board to excel it looks dreadful.

Surely there must be a better option / view here?

Thanks
Alan
